panels.title: Reconcile Triggers by Source (EDB)
panels.description: Compares how many reconciles are driven by Secret rotations vs spec changes. A spike in secret_change confirms the watcher is firing.

panels.title: Secret Rotation Propagation Time (seconds)
panels.description: End-to-end time from a Secret change being detected to the ExternalDatabase reaching Succeeded. This is the SLO metric for credential rotation.

panels.title: Secret Resolution Errors
panels.description: Failures reading a credentials Secret. Reasons are actionable: secret_not_found, key_missing, key_empty, forbidden, or secret_read_failed.

panels.title: Aggregator Call Latency (seconds)
panels.description: P50/P90/P99 latency per controller and operation. Feeds into SLO alerting - if P99 rises, the aggregator is slow.

panels.title: Aggregator Call Outcomes (calls/s)
panels.description: Result breakdown: spec_rejection = CR/spec owner, auth_error = operator credentials/RBAC, server_error = aggregator, network_error = connectivity/platform.

panels.title: Recent Failed Operations by Owner
panels.description: Historical failed operations by owner bucket. Use the CR Health Overview row for exact current CR state.

panels.title: Sustained Failure Signals
panels.description: Failure signals that continue over the recent window. This is event-based history; use CR phase and condition panels for exact current stuck CRs.

panels.title: Async Provisioning Activity
panels.description: Dashboard-only substitute for async operations in flight. Compares InternalDatabase polling activity with terminal completions.

panels.title: Async Provisioning End-to-End Duration (seconds)
panels.description: How long it takes from HTTP 202 (async accepted) to a terminal state (completed / failed / terminated). This is the user-visible provisioning SLO.

panels.title: Async Completion Rate by Outcome
panels.description: Rate of async operations completing per second, split by result (success / failed / terminated). Terminated means the aggregator cancelled and the operator will resubmit.

panels.title: Balancing Rule Aggregator Calls
panels.description: Rate of balancing-rule requests sent by the operator to dbaas-aggregator, split by operation and result.

panels.title: CRs by Current Phase
panels.description: Current phase for dbaas operator CRs. This is a current-state gauge, not a reconcile counter.

panels.title: Unready CRs by Reason
panels.description: Current Ready=False/Unknown conditions by kind and reason. Reasons are intended to route ownership quickly.

panels.title: CRs Waiting for Observed Generation
panels.description: Shows CRs whose metadata.generation is ahead of status.observedGeneration. This is convergence lag, not elapsed time.

panels.title: CR Metrics Collector Health
panels.description: A value of 0 means the custom CR-state collector failed to list that kind during scrape.

panels.title: SecretClaim DatabaseNotFound Age
panels.description: Age of the current DatabaseNotFound streak per DatabaseSecretClaim. Persistent values point to missing DB provisioning or classifier mismatch.

panels.title: SecretClaim Time Since Last Rotation
panels.description: Seconds since each DatabaseSecretClaim last applied rotated connection properties.

panels.title: Balancing Rule Desired vs Applied Targets
panels.description: Compares placement intent from spec with the last applied state recorded in status. These counts do not prove referenced physical databases exist or independently read back aggregator state.

panels.title: NamespaceBinding States
panels.description: Current namespace ownership state from this operator instance's point of view. deleting_with_finalizer means deletion is in progress and the protection finalizer remains; it does not by itself prove blocking resources still exist.

panels.title: Resources Deleting With Finalizers
panels.description: Current dbaas resources that have deletionTimestamp set. deleting_with_finalizer means cleanup/finalizer removal is still pending.
